Title: Server-Side Validation: ChangeCartConfiguredItem Must Reject Payload Missing a Required Text Section
Section: Configurable Products > E2E Conditional Sections > Server Validation
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
GraphiQL accessible at {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql. User authenticated (Bearer token obtainable from browser session). Wedding cake product in cart: a lineItemId exists with Base+Creme+Message selected. Custom text required section (id=@td(CFG_023_SECTIONS.Text)) is required and its parent Message section has a value — the required condition is met. Note: {{USER_ID}} must be resolved dynamically via GraphQL query { me { id } } before the mutation step.
Test_Data: user={{USER_EMAIL}}; password={{USER_PASSWORD}}; back_url={{BACK_URL}}; product_id=@td(CFG_WEDDING_CAKE_CONDITIONAL.id); lineItemId=<obtain from cart before test>; section_custom_text_id=@td(CFG_023_SECTIONS.Text); section_base_id=@td(CFG_023_SECTIONS.Base); section_creme_id=@td(CFG_023_SECTIONS.Creme); section_message_id=@td(CFG_023_SECTIONS.Message)
Assertions:
--- GRAPHQL ---
[ERRORS] Response validationErrors[] or top-level errors[] MUST be non-empty — server must reject the payload because Custom text required section (@td(CFG_023_SECTIONS.Text)) is absent while its parent Message section has a value
[DATA] Error code should reference a required-section validation failure (e.g., MISSING_REQUIRED_SECTION, CONFIGURATION_SECTION_REQUIRED, or equivalent VC platform error code)
[STATUS] HTTP 200 with non-empty errors[] is acceptable (GraphQL transport); HTTP 200 with empty errors[] and cart updated = FAIL
--- STOREFRONT ---
[STATE] After the direct mutation attempt with rejected payload: cart line item must NOT be updated to show Message without Custom text required
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] Capture exact response body — errors[] content, validationErrors[], and HTTP status code
[ERRORS] If errors[] is empty and HTTP 200 and cart is updated: server-side validation absent — this is the backend gap identified in the bug report
[NETWORK] No 5xx response expected; validation errors should produce structured GraphQL errors[], not a server crash
Failure_Signals: HTTP 200 with empty errors[]; cart line item updated to include Message without Custom text required; validationErrors[] empty — confirms server-side validation gap for ChangeCartConfiguredItem on required Text sections
Cleanup: If mutation succeeded (bug confirmed): navigate to cart and remove the invalid line item to restore clean cart state.

Title: E2E: VCST-4713 Mid-Session Condition Switch — Only Final Visible Section State in Cart
Section: Configurable Products > E2E > Conditional > Mid-Session Switch
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Product has parent section (P) with >=2 non-None options, each revealing a DIFFERENT child section (C1, C2)
- Or: Product has parent with child, where switching parent option changes which child is active
Test_Data:
store={{FRONT_URL}}
productUrl=@td(CFG_CONDITIONAL_BIKE.url)
Steps:
--- LAYER: STOREFRONT ---
[NAV] Navigate to configurable product PDP at {{productUrl}}
[ACT] Select Option-A in parent section -- child section C1 becomes visible
[ACT] Select an option in C1
[ACT] Select Option-B in parent section -- C1 hides, C2 (or same child reset) becomes relevant
[ASSERT] Verify previously configured C1 value is cleared from the UI (hidden section value purged)
[ACT] Select an option in the now-visible child section
[ACT] browser_click "Add to Cart"
[WAIT] Wait for cart update
--- LAYER: API ---
[ASSERT] Capture addItem GraphQL request
[ASSERT] Verify configurationItems reflects only the FINAL selections (Option-B for parent, new child selection)
[ASSERT] Verify C1 previous selection is NOT present in configurationItems
Assertions:
[STATE] configurationItems contains only the final visible section selections at cart submit time
[STATE] Values from previously-hidden sections are excluded (clearHiddenSectionValues applied correctly)
[DOM] Cart item shows only the final configured options, not stale options from earlier in the session
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] addItem body does not contain Option-A or the C1 selection; HTTP 200
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on option switch sequence
Failure_Signals: stale C1 value present in configurationItems after parent was switched to Option-B; cart shows both C1 and final-state options (union instead of final state); Add to Cart fails due to stale hidden section value
Cleanup: Remove product from cart; navigate away

Title: E2E: VCST-4713 Admin Configures Conditional Section — Storefront Reflects Show/Hide Rule
Section: Configurable Products > E2E > Conditional > Admin -> Storefront
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:TECHFLOW_ADMIN]
- Configurable product with at least one Product-type section exists in Admin catalog
- No conditional dependency currently configured between sections
Steps:
--- LAYER: ADMIN ---
[NAV] Navigate to Admin > Catalog > Configurable Products at {{backUrl}}
[ACT] Open the product at {{productId}}
[ACT] Select a child section and set its parentSectionId to the product's first section (making it conditional)
[SAVE] Save the product configuration
[ASSERT] Verify save confirmation toast/message appears without errors
--- LAYER: STOREFRONT ---
[WAIT:60s] Wait up to 60 seconds for search index to reflect updated conditional rule — poll productConfiguration(configurableProductId, storeId) query and assert returned section graph matches the just-saved Admin config
[NAV] Navigate to the product PDP on {{store}} for {{productId}}
[ASSERT] Verify the child section is now hidden at page load (condition not yet met)
[ACT] Select an option in the parent section
[ASSERT] Verify the child section appears
[ACT] Reset parent to None
[ASSERT] Verify child section hides again
Assertions:
[ADMIN] Conditional relationship saved without error
[DOM] Storefront PDP reflects the newly configured conditional rule: child hidden until parent has value
[STATE] Round-trip confirmed: Admin config change -> storefront behavior update
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] Admin save API returns 200; [NETWORK] productConfiguration GraphQL on storefront returns dependsOnSectionId for child section after update
[CONSOLE] no errors in admin or storefront during configuration or visibility transition
Failure_Signals: Admin save fails when setting parentSectionId; storefront does not reflect new conditional rule after save (cache issue); child section always visible on storefront despite conditional config; search index delay causes old config to be served > 60s
Cleanup: Optionally revert the conditional configuration in Admin to original state; sign out of admin

Title: E2E: VCST-4713 Required Child Section Hidden When Parent=None — Cart Not Blocked
Section: Configurable Products > E2E > Conditional > Required Hidden Child
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Product has optional parent section P (includes None option) and required child section C (isRequired=true, parentSectionId=P)
- When P=None, C is hidden; when P has value, C is visible and required
Test_Data:
store={{FRONT_URL}}
productUrl=@td(CFG_REQ_CHILD_OPT_PARENT.url)
Steps:
--- LAYER: STOREFRONT ---
[NAV] Navigate to configurable product PDP at {{productUrl}}
[ASSERT] Verify parent section P is visible with None pre-selected
[ASSERT] Verify required child section C is hidden
[ASSERT] Verify Add to Cart button is enabled (hidden required section does not block cart)
[ACT] browser_click "Add to Cart" while C is hidden
[WAIT] Wait for cart update
[ASSERT] Verify product was added to cart successfully (no validation error about C)
--- LAYER: API ---
[ASSERT] Verify addItem GraphQL response has no errors[]; configurationItems does not include section C
--- LAYER: STOREFRONT ---
[ACT] browser_click parent section P and select a non-None option -- C becomes visible
[ASSERT] Verify Add to Cart is now DISABLED (required C is visible but not filled)
[ACT] Select an option in C
[ASSERT] Verify Add to Cart is now ENABLED again
[ACT] browser_click "Add to Cart"
[ASSERT] Verify product added to cart with both P and C in configurationItems
Assertions:
[STATE] Add to Cart is enabled when required child section C is hidden (parent=None)
[STATE] Add to Cart is disabled when required child section C is visible but unfilled
[STATE] Add to Cart is re-enabled when required visible section C is filled
[STATE] configurationItems correctly excludes C when hidden, includes C when visible and filled
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] First addItem (C hidden): configurationItems excludes C, HTTP 200 no errors
[NETWORK] Second addItem (C visible+filled): configurationItems includes both P and C, HTTP 200
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during the full flow
Failure_Signals: Cart blocked by hidden required section (VCST-4713 required-hidden regression); cart not blocked when required visible section is unfilled; C appears in configurationItems when it was hidden; cart badge does not update after add
Cleanup: Remove both cart items added during test; navigate away

Title: E2E: Default Option Pre-Selected on PDP — Flows Through Cart to Order with Correct Price (VCST-4715)
Section: Configurable Products > E2E Default Option > Full Flow
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Storefront accessible. Seed product @td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.slug) deployed, indexed, linked to B2B virtual catalog. Product has a Product-type section with exactly one option marked isDefault=true. User authenticated. Cart empty. Admin accessible at {{BACK_URL}}. SEED REQUIRED before first run: CFG-030 row in products/configurable-products.csv populated with product_id_guid; default_section_id; default_option_id; default_option_name; default_option_price.
Test_Data: user={{USER_EMAIL}}; password={{USER_PASSWORD}}; front_url={{FRONT_URL}}; back_url={{BACK_URL}}; admin={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}; admin_pass={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}; store_id={{STORE_ID}}; currency_code={{CURRENCY_CODE}}; pdp_url={{FRONT_URL}}/products-with-options/configurations/@td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.slug); default_option_name=@td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.default_option_name); default_option_price=@td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.default_option_price); base_price=@td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.price)
Steps:
--- STOREFRONT: PDP ---
[NAV] Sign in at {{FRONT_URL}} with {{USER_EMAIL}} / {{USER_PASSWORD}}
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/products-with-options/configurations/@td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.slug)
[WAIT] Configure the parameters widget visible; price displayed
[ASSERT] Default option (@td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.default_option_name)) is pre-selected WITHOUT user interaction
[ASSERT] Price displayed = @td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.price) + @td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.default_option_price) (MATH: pre-selection included in price)
[ACT] Click Add to Cart (do NOT change the selection — submit with default)
[WAIT] Cart badge increments; success notification
--- STOREFRONT: CART ---
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] Cart page loaded
[ASSERT] Cart line item for @td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.slug) visible
[ASSERT] Line item shows default option name (@td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.default_option_name)) in configuration details
[ASSERT] Line item price = @td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.price) + @td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.default_option_price)
--- API: CART ---
[GQL] POST {{BACK_URL}}/graphql with query: { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" currencyCode: "{{CURRENCY_CODE}}" userId: "<me.id>") { items { id listPrice { amount } configurationItems { sectionId optionId } } } }
[ASSERT] configurationItems[] contains entry for the default section with optionId = @td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.default_option_id)
[ASSERT] listPrice.amount = @td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.price) + @td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.default_option_price)
--- ADMIN: ORDER VERIFICATION ---
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token with {{ADMIN_EMAIL}}/{{ADMIN_PASSWORD}} for admin Bearer token
[HTTP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/order/orders?customerEmail={{USER_EMAIL}}&sort=createdDate:desc (or search for the order)
[ASSERT] Most recent order line item for @td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.slug) shows the default option name in configuration data
Assertions:
--- STOREFRONT ---
[STATE] Default option pre-selected on PDP load without user interaction
[MATH] PDP price = base_price + default_option_price
[STATE] Cart badge increments after Add to Cart
[DOM] Cart line item shows default option name in configuration details
[MATH] Cart line item listPrice.amount = base_price + default_option_price
--- API ---
[ERRORS] addItem mutation errors[] is empty
[DATA] configurationItems[].optionId = @td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.default_option_id) (default option submitted, not None)
[DATA] configurationItems[].sectionId = @td(CFG_WITH_DEFAULT.default_section_id)
[MATH] listPrice.amount = base_price + default_option_price
--- ADMIN ---
[DATA] Admin order line item shows default option name in configuration section
Cross_Layer_Checks:
--- STOREFRONT ---
[CONSOLE] No JS errors on PDP load or Add to Cart
[NETWORK] addItem mutation HTTP 200; errors[] empty in response
[NETWORK] productConfiguration query includes options[].isDefault field
--- API ROUND-TRIP ---
[ROUNDTRIP] PDP displayed price matches cart listPrice.amount
[ROUNDTRIP] configurationItems optionId matches the option that was visually pre-selected on PDP
Failure_Signals: Default option NOT pre-selected on PDP (user sees None); Add to Cart submits empty/None configurationItems (default not submitted); cart price = base_price only (default surcharge missing); admin order shows no configuration option for this line item; isDefault field absent from productConfiguration GQL response
Cleanup: Remove cart item and cancel order after test
References: VCST-4715; Synced: PR #880 vc-module-catalog + PR #115 vc-module-x-cart (2026-05-27)
